scripts.test: node tests/route-utils.test.js && node tests/share-utils.test.js && node tests/place-utils.test.js && node --no-warnings tests/share-api.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check assets/app.js && node --check assets/route-utils.js && node --check assets/share-utils.js && node --check assets/place-utils.js && node --check functions/api/parse.js && node --check functions/api/route.js && node --check functions/api/share.js && node --check 'functions/share/[id].js'
scripts.dev:cloudflare: npx wrangler pages dev . --compatibility-date=2024-09-01 --ai AI --kv ROADBOOKS
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name roadbook-studio --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.cloudflare:setup: npx wrangler kv namespace create ROADBOOKS --binding ROADBOOKS --update-config
